description: Create an animation of a red ball bouncing against the background image located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/room_bg.jpg' using OpenToonz. The animation must show the ball high in the air at frame 1, hitting the floor at frame 12, and bouncing back up by frame 24. Render at least 24 frames of the animation as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/bouncing_ball/', ensuring the background is visible in the final output.
